archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) & Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) Hybrid - 'Midnight Mountain'

layout_spacing.philosophy: Dense but aspirational. Dashboard grids use Mode B 'Control Room' but with slightly more generous padding to reduce fatigue. 'Control Room' grid with tight gaps for data, generous padding for containers.

components.sidebar: Darker than main content (#0B0F15). Right border 1px solid #283341. Includes an 'Elevation Status' visual.
components.cards: Flat solid surfaces (bg-[#161D26]). 1px subtle border (#283341). No heavy shadows. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and border color darkens to #4F7C8A.
components.buttons: Primary: Terracotta (#E26E4A) background, bold white text. Secondary: Minimalist 1px border (#283341) with text #F8FAFC.
components.kanban_board: Columns defined by subtle vertical grid lines. Cards are dense. Tag colors match stage 'altitudes' (Basecamp, Ascent, Summit).
components.tables: Shadcn based. Left aligned. Generous row padding (py-4). Hover state on rows.
components.forms: Left-aligned. Input fields use flat background with 1px borders, subtle focus ring (ring-[#E26E4A]).

signature_elements: Elevation-Gain Indicator: Progress bars styled as a stepped gradient or altitude meter (e.g., deal probability moving up).
Topographic Motif: Extremely subtle (5% opacity) SVG topographic contour lines on empty states, auth screens, or marketing sections.
Altitude Badges: Small pill tags using elevation terms (e.g., 'Basecamp' for new leads, 'Summit' for closed won) instead of generic text.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for sticky headers. bg-[#0B0F15]/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-[#283341].
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a high-end, duotone look.
visual_enhancers.borders: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look) for data-heavy sections. border-collapse style layout.

images.description: Mountain peak sunrise for aspirational empty states or auth screen
Sunset over mountain for 'No Deals Found' or completed tasks
Team hiking rocky hill for 'Invite Your Team' screen
Topographic map for subtle card backgrounds (use at 5% opacity and grayscale in CSS)

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Midnight Mountain' Dark Theme palette. Use #E26E4A (Terracotta) for primary actions.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import and use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text.
Run 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' and use Phosphor Icons for all UI icons to maintain a premium look.

Do NOT use standard Shadcn Card components with their default heavy shadows and white backgrounds. Strip them down to use flat, 1px bordered divs (bg-[#161D26] with border-[#283341]) to achieve the Grid Borders 'Technical' look.
Implement 'Altitude Badges' in the Kanban board and CRM tables (e.g., tags reading 'Basecamp', 'Ascent', 'Summit').
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements following kebab-case role-based conventions.
Do not center-align forms and dense information. Left-align them for readability.
For empty states, overlay the provided topographic image or mountain peak image with a heavy dark gradient (bg-black/70) to ensure text readability.
Ensure hover states explicitly define text color (e.g., hover:text-white) and focus states have high contrast.
Apply 'Grid Layout Technical Rules' - ensure grid items are direct children, use gap-6 for macro layout, and dense spacing inside cards.
